data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Root cause: write-reviewer-findings.sh hardcodes output to reviewer-findings.json (line 36). No --output flag exists. Agent definitions also hardcode the write path. When 3 parallel sonnet agents run in deep tier, they all clobber the same file. Fix: add --output flag to write-reviewer-findings.sh and update agent definitions to use FINDINGS_OUTPUT when provided.
